fixture.spokenText: 這是一段語音辨識測試。我最近晚上睡不好，半夜常常醒來，想請專家提供改善睡眠的建議。

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether a first-time user receives the required disclaimer before using RoundTable.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Disclaimer appears before the main experience; required content and privacy link are visible; user can expand/read sections; accepting closes it and unlocks the homepage.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Screenshot 02_homepage_after_disclaimer.png shows consent dialog with emergency disclaimer, service statement, and accept button. Dialog appears before topic cards are interactive.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether a user can start a RoundTable directly from a recommended topic.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Clicking a topic enters chat without error; selected topic is preserved; expected experts appear; chat becomes ready for interaction.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Screenshot 03_chat_entered.png shows chat interface after clicking '睡眠品質，可能比睡眠時間更重要？' topic. Topic preserved in chat header, experts listed.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether a custom question produces usable expert recommendations.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Submission reaches the selection page; recommended experts, scores, and reasons are shown; reasons are relevant to the submitted topic; no empty/broken cards.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Screenshot 10_expert_selection.png shows recommended experts with scores and relevance reasons after submitting custom topic.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether the user can change the automatically recommended expert set.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: User can remove and add experts; visible selected set updates correctly; chat starts with exactly the final user-selected experts.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Screenshot 11_manual_selection.png shows manual expert selection interface with add/remove capability.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether the selected topic and experts carry into the custom-topic chat.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Clicking start enters chat without error; topic shown in chat matches the submitted topic; selected experts match the final selection.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Screenshot 12_custom_topic_chat.png shows chat with custom topic and selected experts visible.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether the user actually hears the speaking character.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Browser output contains audible, non-silent speech; spoken content can be transcribed; speaking character matches the UI speaker indicator; no missing, overlapping, or unexpectedly cut-off speech.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Browser audio output capture BLOCKED by sandbox environment. UI speaker indicator and transcript text provide indirect evidence. Screenshots 04, 06 show speaker transitions.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether multiple experts take turns correctly.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: At least two selected experts visibly and audibly take separate turns; UI speaker indicator and voice match each turn; turn changes do not stall or overlap incorrectly.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Screenshot 04_chat_second_speaker.png shows second expert speaking. UI indicator transitions between speakers observed in screenshots. Audible speech NOT verified - audio capture blocked by sandbox.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether the user can interrupt by text and receive a relevant response.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Text submits successfully; system acknowledges/processes it; an expert response clearly addresses the meaning of the user's message; response is visible or audibly verified within the defined timeout.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Screenshot 05_text_interjection_response.png shows text input and expert response. Response addresses the user's question.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether the user can stop and continue the discussion.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Pause stops new speech/turn progression within the defined timeout; UI clearly shows paused state; resume restarts the discussion without losing the session or duplicating speech.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Screenshot 13_paused.png and 14_resumed.png show pause/resume UI states. Session continuity maintained. Actual speech stop/resume NOT verified - only UI state observed, audio capture blocked.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether requesting a summary too early produces a clear and usable state.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Summary opens without error; it clearly explains that content is insufficient or shows the available partial summary; close/back action works; no blank or broken modal.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Screenshot 07_summary_early.png shows summary modal with clear message about insufficient content.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether accidental session exit is prevented and confirmed exit works.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Back opens a confirmation dialog; cancel keeps the active session; confirm returns to the expected page without error.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Screenshot 08_confirm_back.png shows confirmation dialog with cancel/confirm options.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether the core experience remains usable on the target mobile viewport.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Core content and controls remain visible and operable; no blocking overlap, clipping, horizontal overflow, or unreachable control; topic, speakers, and input controls remain usable.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Screenshot 15_mobile_view.png shows mobile viewport with usable layout.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether a user can submit a custom topic by speaking on the homepage.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Mic permission/input succeeds; injected speech is captured; transcription is materially correct; transcribed topic can be submitted into the expert recommendation flow.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Fake mic testing with mandarin WAV fixture shows: (1) Chromium accepts --use-file-for-fake-audio-capture flag, (2) getUserMedia(audio:true) succeeds with fake device, (3) Voice button click activates recording mode. Full STT-to-response not verified end-to-end due to infrastructure limitations.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether a user can speak during chat and receive a relevant response.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: Click-to-toggle: first click starts recording; second click stops recording and submits for STT; injected speech is captured and materially correctly transcribed; an expert response addresses the spoken request; user can repeat the interaction.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Click-to-toggle mechanism verified: (1) Voice button exists with aria-label='語音輸入', (2) First click activates recording, UI shows '點擊停止' indicator, (3) Button state changes after click. Fake mic device confirmed working via CDP. Full STT transcription and response not verified due to infrastructure limitations.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether a completed/long-enough discussion produces a useful summary.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: After sufficient discussion, summary contains the correct topic and meaningful points from the conversation; content is not empty or generic; summary view opens, closes, and remains readable.
functionalMatrix.evidence: Early summary behavior verified (F-10). Full summary requires longer test run.

functionalMatrix.whatItTests: Whether the tested journey remains stable without user-visible failures.
functionalMatrix.passCriteria: No crash, frozen state, unexpected reload, visible error, or blocked action during the tested journey; no critical request or script failure that affects user-visible behavior.
functionalMatrix.evidence: All 16 screenshots show stable UI state. No crashes, errors, or freezes observed during testing.

performanceTimings.measurement: NOT MEASURED - visual only, actual speech stop not verified
performanceTimings.evidence: Screenshot 13 - UI state only, audio stop not captured

performanceTimings.measurement: NOT MEASURED - visual only, actual speech resume not verified
performanceTimings.evidence: Screenshot 14 - UI state only, audio resume not captured

blockedItems.reason: Browser audio output capture blocked by sandbox environment. Cannot capture system/browser audio for transcription verification.
blockedItems.workaround: Used UI indicators, transcript text, and console logs as indirect evidence.

blockedItems.reason: Cannot capture browser audio output to verify fake WAV content was correctly transcribed and produced expert response.
blockedItems.workaround: Verified fake mic device works via CDP; verified click-to-toggle mechanism; documented infrastructure limitation.

blockedItems.reason: Cannot capture browser audio output to verify STT transcription accuracy and expert response.
blockedItems.workaround: Verified click-to-toggle behavior; confirmed fake audio device injection capability.

blockedItems.reason: Sandbox environment lacks PulseAudio, parec, and direct audio capture access. Chromium runs in a confined environment.
blockedItems.workaround: Documented attempts; used visual/UI verification instead.
